main.mass1: This holiday season our hearts are filled with excitement for what’s coming up. We’re happy to finally reveal it to you....
main.line1: To ring in the New Year, we’ve prepared a gift for you:
main.line2: have been added to your trading account!
main.dimatext: This entire year we’ve been working hard to make your trading experience unforgettable. There are currently 354 members in our team and they aren’t only smart and dedicated. Many of them are gorgeous as well, so we’ve decided to share this beauty with you. Please enjoy this complimentary desktop calendar and may 2017 bring you much joy, happiness and prosperity!
